en.extract:
The buff-bridled Inca finch (Incaspiza laeta) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru where its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland.

The '''buff-bridled Inca finch''' ('''''Incaspiza laeta''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Thraupidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Peru]] where its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical dry [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical high-altitude [[shrubland]].
